name: polymath-mcp
description: Technical-domain expertise MCP spanning AI engineering/ops, data & BI, cloud/infra, security/trust/forensics, technical support, delivery leadership, AI safety & frontier threat (red-team/CBRNE/safeguards), product design & frontend, AI hardware & silicon (electrical/FPGA/ASIC/accelerators), and ML modeling & computational science (model training + applied math): what the work actually is, how to build a project, how to level up, and current stacks/trends verified live via research. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
